Zone map pruning is working effectively across all queries. Q6 shows exceptional pruning (15.28% of blocks), Q3 shows good pruning (54.04% of blocks). All query results appear semantically correct with expected cardinalities and value ranges for TPC-H SF10 dataset. Ingestion took 422.051 seconds as a one-time cost.
